summary:
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Advisories - 2025, directness=high, why=Primary source for 2025 maritime advisories including Strait of Hormuz risk updates, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products/advisories/2025  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=UKMTO Products (Advisories & Monthly Reports), directness=high, why=Central hub for all UKMTO security advisories and monthly maritime updates; confirms structured reporting on high-risk zones like Hormuz, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=Monthly Maritime Security Update Report, directness=high, why=Regularly published operational intelligence product; critical for tracking evolving risk trends in 2025, next=https://www.ukmto.org/ukmto-products/monthly-reports  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=JMIC Week 25 Dashboard (16–22 June 2025), directness=high, why=Contains real-time, verified incident data and risk assessments for Hormuz region in 2025; actionable for forecasting, next=https://www.ukmto.org/-/media/ukmto/products/jmic-week-25-dashboard-16-june---22-june-2025.pdf  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=JMIC Advisory Note 20 March 2026, directness=medium, why=Forward-looking advisory (dated 2026) implies ongoing risk monitoring; may contain extrapolated 2025 trends or legacy context, next=https://www.ukmto.org/-/media/ukmto/products/update-020---jmic-advisory-note-20-mar_final.pdf  
- publisher=UKHO, title=Security Related Information to Mariners (SRIM), directness=medium, why=UKHO collaborates with UKMTO; MSCs provide complementary navigational risk charts, though not UKMTO-specific, next=https://www.ukho.gov.uk/ProductsandServices/MartimeSafety/Pages/SRIM.aspx  
- publisher=UKMTO, title=About UKMTO, directness=low, why=Confirms institutional credibility and 20+ year mandate in maritime security, supports trust in advisories, next=https://www.ukmto.org/about-us
